## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] New policy template
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Testing

<!-- How did you test this? For policy changes, include sample disputes and expected rulings -->

- [ ] Tested against live API (`https://agentcourt-api-production.up.railway.app`)
- [ ] Ran `python -m pytest tests/ -v` (8 tests)
- [ ] Updated documentation
